page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG: The NERV White Paper
text:
is a card-based role-playing game written by Mitsuhiro Nakazawa released by Kadokawa Shoten on 20 April 1996. https://www.kadokawa.co.jp/product/199999714513/ The set consists of 138 pages dedicated to explaining the rules and various story inserts, plus 20 pages of cut-out cards for playing. A map of Tokyo-3 that serves as the game board is also included in the set.
